mustPass: Has home route '/' and a contact route.
Route set reflects tobaksvarutillverkning by including product and production-focused pages.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
All paths are Swedish, lowercase and without trailing slash.
All wording stays factual and avoids invented certifications, counts or compliance claims.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic service-business structure without product or production pages
consumer e-commerce assumptions such as cart or checkout
health claims, promotional claims or unsupported regulatory statements
placeholder trust signals that are not backed by provided company data
